title: Samuel Mod
description: Samuel's modifications. A collection of subjective, vanilla+ features.
body:
Samuel's modifications. A collection of subjective, vanilla+ features.

### __Frozen Berries__

Player can freeze a bush, halting it's growth, by using any color dye on it.

Player can unfreeze a frozen bush by brushing (using brush) off the dye that's on the bush. 

__Note:__
Both operations preserve berry bush age, and therefore size. 
Also, a frozen bush can be bone-mealed

#### __Lore__
I saw a tree with a big red circle painted on it. I think they had cut off a branch and didn't want it to grow, so they put some red substance to keep that branch from growing back. That tree hasn't grown a new branch since it was painted, maybe 5 years ago, so dying the bush in game makes it stop growing! I am not an arborist.
